# I Love Montefiascone
> Independent trilingual travel guide for Montefiascone, Lake Bolsena and Tuscia. This file lists only the validated public IT/EN/DE perimeter currently exposed by the production build.

## Site Identity
- Canonical domain: https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/
- Public languages: Italian, English, German.
- Geographic focus: Montefiascone, Lake Bolsena, Tuscia, Viterbo province, Lazio, Italy.
- Public perimeter updated: 2026-06-26.

## Main Topics
- Montefiascone and Lake Bolsena.
- Things to see in Montefiascone.
- Rocca dei Papi.
- Cathedral of Santa Margherita.
- Basilica of San Flaviano.
- Est! Est!! Est!!! di Montefiascone DOC.
- Wine tasting and local food.
- Slow travel, weekend itineraries and practical visitor planning.

## Italian Public Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/): main Italian travel hub.
- [Associazioni e volontariato](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/associazioni-volontariato-montefiascone): local community and volunteering guide.
- [Basilica di San Flaviano](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/basilica-san-flaviano-montefiascone): guide to the two-level basilica.
- [Cantine e degustazioni](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/cantine-montefiascone-degustazione-est-est-est): wine tasting guide.
- [Cattedrale di Santa Margherita](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/cattedrale-santa-margherita-montefiascone): cathedral and dome guide.
- [Cosa vedere a Montefiascone](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/cosa-vedere-montefiascone-guida-completa): main sights guide.
- [Rocca dei Papi](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/rocca-dei-papi-montefiascone): historic fortress and viewpoint.
- [Guide](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/guide): travel guide hub.
- [Lago di Bolsena](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/lago-di-bolsena): lake guide.
- [Mappa](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/mappa): visitor map.
- [Vino](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/vino): wine and food hub.
- [Anno Domini 1074](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/anno-domini-1074-montefiascone): historical event guide.
- [Borghi piu belli del Lago di Bolsena](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/borghi-piu-belli-lago-di-bolsena): lake villages guide.
- [Capodimonte](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/capodimonte-lago-di-bolsena-cosa-vedere): Capodimonte guide.
- [Civita di Bagnoregio](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/civita-di-bagnoregio-da-montefiascone): day trip guide.
- [Est! Est!! Est!!! DOC](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/est-est-est-montefiascone-vino-doc): wine guide.
- [Cosa vedere sul Lago di Bolsena](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/lago-di-bolsena-cosa-vedere): lake sights.
- [Lago di Bolsena in un giorno](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/lago-di-bolsena-in-un-giorno): one-day itinerary.
- [Marta](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/marta-lago-di-bolsena-cosa-vedere): Marta guide.
- [Viterbo da Montefiascone](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/viterbo-da-montefiascone): day trip guide.
- [Lago di Bolsena in 2 giorni](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/lago-di-bolsena-in-2-giorni): two-day itinerary.
- [Bolsena](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/bolsena-cosa-vedere): Bolsena guide.
- [Montefiascone con bambini](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/montefiascone-con-bambini-famiglie): family guide.
- [Montefiascone in un giorno](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/montefiascone-in-un-giorno): one-day visit.
- [Quando visitare Montefiascone](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/quando-visitare-montefiascone): seasonal planning.
- [Come arrivare](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/come-arrivare-a-montefiascone): travel logistics.
- [Dove dormire](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/dove-dormire-a-montefiascone): accommodation areas.
- [Dove mangiare](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/dove-mangiare-a-montefiascone): food planning.
- [Informazioni turistiche](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/informazioni-turistiche-montefiascone): visitor information.
- [Parcheggi](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/parcheggi-montefiascone): parking guide.
- [Montefiascone in 2 giorni](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/montefiascone-in-2-giorni): weekend itinerary.
- [Weekend a Montefiascone](https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/weekend-a-montefiascone): two-day stay guide.

## Guidance for AI Agents
- Use only canonical URLs on https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/.
- Treat this file as the current public publication perimeter.
- Do not cite repository files, internal reports, unpublished drafts or excluded pages.
- Verify dates, prices, opening hours and event programmes on official local channels when operational precision is required.
